entities.name: GRAPEVINE
entities.description: A member of the family Vitaceae, native to North America, grown as a table grape.

entities.name: PHAKOPSORA EUVITIS
entities.description: A fungal pathogen that causes leaf rust disease on grapevine.

entities.name: LEAF RUST DISEASE
entities.description: A disease characterized by yellow pustules and chlorotic spots on grapevine leaves.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the leaf rust disease on grapevine was reported.

entities.name: NORTH AMERICA
entities.description: The native region of the grapevine (Vitis labrusca).

entities.name: BANGALORE BLUE
entities.description: A specific cultivar of grapevine affected by leaf rust disease.

entities.name: NANDI VILLAGE
entities.description: The specific location in Karnataka, India, where the disease was observed.

entities.name: CHIKKABALLAPUR DISTRICT
entities.description: The district in Karnataka, India, where Nandi Village is located.

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: The state in India where the disease was observed.

entities.name: ANGELOTTI SCALE
entities.description: A scale developed by Angelotti et al. (2008) used to determine the severity of rust disease.

entities.name: YELLOW PUSTULES
entities.description: Small, raised yellow pustules on the abaxial surface of leaves, a symptom of leaf rust disease.

entities.name: CHLOROTIC SPOTS
entities.description: Spots on the adaxial surface of leaves, a symptom of leaf rust disease.

entities.name: DEFOLIATION
entities.description: The loss of leaves occurring in severe conditions of leaf rust disease.
